notes: Composite score for the new-vs-legacy embedding switch decision (154-403). composite = weighted average over four developer-domain retrieval metrics (mixed / ja / bilingual / dev_workflow recall@10), each clamped to [0,1]. Switch only when candidate composite - baseline composite >= switchDeltaThreshold. Equal weighting is the evidence-free initial prior; retune from 154-402 shadow A/B artifacts (no code change). switchDeltaThreshold 0.05 is deliberately higher than cheap flag-flip gates (s108 0.02) because swapping embeddings forces a ~14GB re-index, so a switch must clear a clear win. S154-501: ci_lower_bound_enabled=true switches the gate to delta >= max(switchDeltaThreshold, paired-bootstrap CI95 width) — tightening only, ADOPTED 2026-06-12 (D29 amendment accepted): the gate requires delta >= max(switchDeltaThreshold, paired-bootstrap CI95 width). The A/B artifact records the CI regardless of this flag.
